entry.title: the best coffee & second best breakfast sandwich in San Francisco is my favorite way to spend a sunny Saturday ❤️ Have you been to Ocean Beach Cafe or Andytown yet??! If not, RUN Also, I've linked my Popflex outfit on my LTK. It DOES fit us curvy gals (!!

entry.title: the camera man was VERY confused but we had so much fun taking these family photos with our cat for our holiday cards!! This was back in 2015 (how is that almost 10 years ago?!) We went to the JC Pennys photo studio and brought our cat dressed in a match
entry.content: the camera man was VERY confused but we had so much fun taking these family photos with our cat for our holiday cards!! This was back in 2015 (how is that almost 10 years ago?!) We went to the JC Pennys photo studio and brought our cat dressed in a match

entry.title: the world's TALLEST Christmas tree!! ⬇️ 😱 Buddy the Elf would be beside himself if he saw this. 🎄🚂 Hidden up in Northern California's redwood forest outside Willits is this giant 222 foot coastal Redwood tree that gets all decorated for the holidays. 🥰 Yo

entry.title: Santa Pie is the best thing you can bake this holiday season and I will die on this hill 🎅🥧 This is a recipe my mom made very Christmas season that I now make as well! Santa Pie is basically chocolate on chocolate on chocolate. 🍫 What's your favorite thin

entry.title: PSA this makes a Christmas gift for the tea lover in your life. I bought this for myself, but it's a great gift idea. Nothing hits like Fortnums!! 🫖 🇬🇧 Ps - linked these directly on my LTK. Link in bio or linked in my comments #fortnumandmason #tea #eng

entry.title: I'm convinced Thanksgiving in San Francisco is the best time to be in the city #sanfrancisco we did a really long walk in Golden Gate Park. went Trader Joe's shopping and it wasn't too crowded. Hit up the Dickens fair which was so much fun and again not
entry.content: I'm convinced Thanksgiving in San Francisco is the best time to be in the city #sanfrancisco we did a really long walk in Golden Gate Park. went Trader Joe's shopping and it wasn't too crowded. Hit up the Dickens fair which was so much fun and again not

entry.title: Bay Area - the Dickens Fair is BACK! Send this to someone you want to go with this year. 🎄🇬🇧Transport back in time to ye olde London at Christmas time. The team at @dickenfair seriously goes all out with insanely elaborate sets and shows, including live

entry.title: best San Jose, CA holiday pop-up bars ⬇️ 🎄 this is your sign to go on a Christmas pop-up bar crawl in Downtown San Jose!! Went last week with the girls and had so much fun. 🎄Stop 1: Paper Planes, a Miracle pop-up bar. LOVED their unicorn cocktail and frie

entry.title: It was about girlhood all along & having the time of our lives fighting dragons together in sequin outfits. ✨ From grainy livestreams to shows, thank you Taylor 🫶✨ Currently sitting in my bed still processing this weekend in Vancouver. I've seen a lot of
entry.content: It was about girlhood all along & having the time of our lives fighting dragons together in sequin outfits. ✨ From grainy livestreams to shows, thank you Taylor 🫶✨ Currently sitting in my bed still processing this weekend in Vancouver. I've seen a lot of

entry.title: This millennial girl needs a whole month to recover from Eras. I see lots of wine, hallmark movies, face masks and nail polish in my near future. ✨🫶 ⭐️ follow me for more relatable content #millennial #lol #humor #30something #over30 #erastour #taylorswi
entry.content: This millennial girl needs a whole month to recover from Eras. I see lots of wine, hallmark movies, face masks and nail polish in my near future. ✨🫶 ⭐️ follow me for more relatable content #millennial #lol #humor #30something #over30 #erastour #taylorswi
